chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition: The policy window during which a product can be returned after purchase, set at 30 days, enabling a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CUST_ID attribute in the CUSTOMER_MASTER entity, serving as the unique customer identifier (primary key) used to join related data such as SALES_ORDER_HDR.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | - CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual or entity registered on the e-commerce platform who has made at least one purchase and acts as a purchaser in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single product entry within a sales order that specifies the product and the quantity ordered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity Of Units
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric field representing the count of units of a product, typically used to express how many items are ordered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | | QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents a single line item in a sales order, linking the order (ORDER_ID) to a specific product (PRODUCT_ID).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line within a Sales Order that specifies a product, quantity, and unit price (with a unique line identifier).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A foreign key column in TB_CATEGORY that stores the ID of the immediate parent category, enabling a self-referential category hierarchy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction that settles the amount due for a Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment_ID, and linked to exactly one Sales Order (a Sales Order may have one or more Payments).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Sales Order Header is the high-level record for each customer sales order, containing the order's unique identifier (ORDER_ID) and the customer reference (CUST_ID) linking to the Customer Master.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order. | - CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipments
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the entity representing a single physical delivery of goods to a customer, uniquely identified by a shipment ID, linked to exactly one Sales Order, and associated with a tracking number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Tracking number | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique identifier for a product in the product master dataset (primary key for TB_PRODUCT).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Primary Key Data Type
entities_post_resolution.definition: An integer data type used to define primary key columns in relational database tables, encompassing both INT and BIGINT variants.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

entities_post_resolution.name: Decimal(10,2)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A decimal numeric data type with precision 12 and scale 2 used to store monetary amounts (e.g., line amounts and payment totals) within the business data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO | | | LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO | | | AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For
entities_post_resolution.definition: A geographic region identifier used to determine applicable tax rules and to calculate taxes for a transaction or entity.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A policy that specifies the conditions under which customers can return products for a refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Varchar(100)
entities_post_resolution.definition: Carrier tracking number field (VARCHAR(100)) used to identify shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO | | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | | PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit card, PayPal, etc. | NO |

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional grouping, and the date when the customer record was created along with active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information including identifiers, SKUs, names, category linkage, pricing, and active status for the product inventory.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the hierarchical category data for products, including each category's identifier, its name, and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual items included in each order, including product, quantity, pricing, and the line-level total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about payments processed for orders, including the method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments linked to customer orders, including warehouse source, shipping timestamp, tracking information, and current status.
